resources.string: Rooted Device|##|Device is rooted
OS Outdated|##|Device is insecure, OS is outdated.
Screen Passcode Not Present|##|Device is insecure, passcode not enabled.
App Tampering|##|This app is tampered and not safe to proceed.
Screen Recording|##|The device screen might be getting captured and recorded.
Emulated Environment|##|The application is running in an emulated environment.
System Threat|##|System Threat is detected.
Network MITM|##|MITM is detected on connected network.
Rogue Network|##|Rouge WiFi detected on connected network.
Pineapple Wifi|##|Pineapple WiFi detected on connected network.
Captive Portal|##|Captive portal is detected on connected network.
Network SSL Stripping|##|SSL stripping is detected on connected network.
Network Content Manipulation|##|Content manipulation detected on connected network.
Blacklisted Network|##|Connected wifi network is insecure. This network is blacklisted by the enterprise.
Unsecured Access Point|##|Device is connected to open or unsecure WiFi.
VPN Connection|##|A VPN connection has been detected on this device.
Network Threat|##|Network Threat is detected
Network Threat|##|Network Threat is detected on __NETWORK_SSID__
Repacked App|##|The app with the package name __APP_PACKAGE__ is repackaged.
Malware App|##|The app with the package name __APP_PACKAGE__ could be malicious.
MALICIOUS IP|##|Malicious IP detected
Unknown Source Installation|##|Device is insecure, unknown source installation is turned on.
Unknown Source Installation|##|The app with the package name __APP_PACKAGE__ may allow installation of unsafe apps.
Unknown Source Installation|##|Device is insecure, installation from unknown source is allowed.
Usb Debuging|##|Device is insecure, usb debugging is enabled.
Developer Options|##|Device is insecure, developer option is enabled.
Fake SSL Certificate|##|Fake SSL certificate detected.
Third Party Store|##|Third party store with package name __APP_PACKAGE__ is detected.
Device Admin List|##|Unsafe device admin app __APP_PACKAGE__ detected..
Device Admin List|##|Unsafe device admin app detected..
Device Encrypted|##|Device is not encrypted.
Blacklisted App|##|Blacklisted application detected.
Blacklisted App|##|App with package name __APP_PACKAGE__ is blacklisted.
SYSTEM EVENT|##|System event threat detected.
SELinux Disabled|##|Device is insecure, selinux security is disabled.
Fake Corporate Wifi|##|Fake corporate wifi detected.
Device Accessibility Option|##|Device is insecure, accessibility option is enabled.
Device Accessibility Option|##|Device is insecure, accessibility option is enabled for package name _APP_PACKAGE__
App From Unknown Source|##|Apps from unknown sources are detected.
App From Unknown Source|##|The app with the package name __APP_PACKAGE__ is installed from unknown source.
External Display|##|External Display detected.
Missing Safety Net|##|Safety Net is missing.
PHA is Disabled|##|Protection from Potentially Harmful Applications is disabled.
